subcodes.first_line: O ye who are oppressed in the path of God! The tyrannical oppressors have stretched forth the hand of aggression, and the cruel ones have displayed the might of their arms [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ستمدیدگان راه یزدان عوانان دست تطاول گشودند و ستمکاران قوت بازو نمودند
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @transcending the material condition, @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement
